title: spermacoce sagrana
intro: Spermacoce sagrana, also known as Kali Musli, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to India. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce sagrana include its ability to enhance fertility, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or capsule, and is often used in herbal preparations to support reproductive and digestive health.
